lines.english: Your glorious greatness is wonderful and marvellous.
All beings are Yours, O Merciful Lord.
Nanak ever meditates on the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||2||23||87||
You cherish Your devotees.
The Lord is always with me.
The Messenger of Death does not approach me.
Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl:
The Perfect Guru has done it perfectly.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਸਮਨ ਮਾਰਿ ਵਿਡਾਰੇ ਸਗਲੇ ਦਾਸ ਕਉ ਸੁਮਤਿ ਦੀਤੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: dusaman maar viddaare sagale daas kau sumat deetee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He has beaten and driven off my enemies, and given me, His slave, the sublime understanding of the neutral mind. ||1||Pause||
God holds me close in His embrace, and protects me.
True are the Teachings of the True Guru. ||1||
God has blessed all places with prosperity.
I have returned again safe and sound.
Nanak has entered God's Sanctuary.
It has eradicated all disease. ||2||24||88||
Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰਬ ਸੁਖਾ ਕਾ ਦਾਤਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਤਾ ਕੀ ਸਰਨੀ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: sarab sukhaa kaa daataa satigur taa kee saranee paaeeai |
lines.english: The True Guru is the Giver of all peace and comfort - seek His Sanctuary.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਰਸਨੁ ਭੇਟਤ ਹੋਤ ਅਨੰਦਾ ਦੂਖੁ ਗਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਗਾਈਐ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: darasan bhettat hot anandaa dookh geaa har gaaeeai |1|
lines.english: Beholding the Blessed Vision of His Darshan, bliss ensues, pain is dispelled, and one sings the Lord's Praises. ||1||
Drink in the sublime essence of the Lord, O Siblings of Destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸਹਿ ਪਰਾਪਤਿ ਜਿਸੁ ਧੁਰਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਸੋਈ ਪੂਰਨੁ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: tiseh paraapat jis dhur likhiaa soee pooran bhaaee |
lines.english: Only one who has such pre-ordained destiny receives it; he alone becomes perfect, O Siblings of Destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਹੁ ਨਾਮੋ ਆਰਾਧਹੁ ਗੁਰ ਪੂਰੇ ਕੀ ਸਰਨਾਈ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: naam japahu naamo aaraadhahu gur poore kee saranaaee | rahaau |
lines.english: Chant the Naam, the Name of the Lord; worship the Naam in adoration, and enter the Sanctuary of the Perfect Guru. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਕੀ ਬੇਨੰਤੀ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਜੀ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਹਾ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਈ ॥੨॥੨੫॥੮੯॥
lines.translit: naanak kee benantee prabh jee naam rahaa liv laaee |2|25|89|
lines.english: Nanak's prayer, O Dear God, is to remain lovingly absorbed in the Naam. ||2||25||89||
Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਨ ਕਰਾਵਨ ਹਰਿ ਅੰਤਰਜਾਮੀ ਜਨ ਅਪੁਨੇ ਕੀ ਰਾਖੈ ॥
lines.translit: karan karaavan har antarajaamee jan apune kee raakhai |
lines.english: The Lord is the Cause of Causes, the Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts; He preserves the honor of His servant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈ ਜੈ ਕਾਰੁ ਹੋਤੁ ਜਗ ਭੀਤਰਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਰਸੁ ਚਾਖੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jai jai kaar hot jag bheetar sabad guroo ras chaakhai |1|
lines.english: He is hailed and congratulated throughout the world, and he tastes the sublime essence of the Word of the Guru's Shabad. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਸਮਰਥੁ ਸਰਨਿ ਕਾ ਦਾਤਾ ਆਠ ਪਹਰ ਤੁਮੑ ਧਿਆਈ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: too samarath saran kaa daataa aatth pehar tuma dhiaaee | rahaau |
lines.english: You are all-powerful, the Giver of Sanctuary; twenty-four hours a day, I meditate on You. ||Pause||
Dear God, Lord of the world, You are my only support.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਜਨੁ ਭਜਨੁ ਕਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤੇਰਾ ਤਿਸੈ ਅੰਦੇਸਾ ਨਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: jo jan bhajan kare prabh teraa tisai andesaa naahee |
lines.english: That humble being, who vibrates upon You, O God, is not afflicted by anxiety.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਚਰਨ ਲਗੇ ਭਉ ਮਿਟਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਏ ਮਨ ਮਾਹੀ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: satigur charan lage bhau mittiaa har gun gaae man maahee |2|
lines.english: Attached to the Feet of the True Guru, his fear is dispelled, and within his mind, he sings the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਖ ਸਹਜ ਆਨੰਦ ਘਨੇਰੇ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਦੀਆ ਦਿਲਾਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: sookh sehaj aanand ghanere satigur deea dilaasaa |
lines.english: He abides in celestial peace and utter ecstasy; the True Guru has comforted him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਣਿ ਘਰਿ ਆਏ ਸੋਭਾ ਸੇਤੀ ਪੂਰਨ ਹੋਈ ਆਸਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jin ghar aae sobhaa setee pooran hoee aasaa |3|
lines.english: He has returned home victorious, with honor, and his hopes have been fulfilled. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਾ ਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰੀ ਮਤਿ ਜਾ ਕੀ ਪੂਰਨ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕੇ ਕਾਮਾ ॥
lines.translit: pooraa gur pooree mat jaa kee pooran prabh ke kaamaa |
lines.english: Perfect are the Teachings of the Perfect Guru; Perfect are the actions of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਚਰਨੀ ਲਾਗਿ ਤਰਿਓ ਭਵ ਸਾਗਰੁ ਜਪਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਾ ॥੪॥੨੬॥੯੦॥
lines.translit: gur charanee laag tario bhav saagar jap naanak har har naamaa |4|26|90|
lines.english: Grasping hold of the Guru's feet, Nanak has crossed over the terrifying world-ocean, chanting the Name of the Lord, Har, Har. ||4||26||90||
Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਇਓ ਕਿਰਪਾਲੁ ਦੀਨ ਦੁਖ ਭੰਜਨੁ ਆਪੇ ਸਭ ਬਿਧਿ ਥਾਟੀ ॥
lines.translit: bheo kirapaal deen dukh bhanjan aape sabh bidh thaattee |
lines.english: Becoming merciful, the Destroyer of the pains of the poor has Himself devised all devices.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਰਾਖਿ ਲੀਓ ਜਨੁ ਅਪੁਨਾ ਗੁਰ ਪੂਰੈ ਬੇੜੀ ਕਾਟੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: khin meh raakh leeo jan apunaa gur poorai berree kaattee |1|
lines.english: In an instant, He has saved His humble servant; the Perfect Guru has cut away his bonds. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਗੁਰ ਗੋਵਿੰਦੁ ਸਦ ਧਿਆਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: mere man gur govind sad dhiaaeeai |
lines.english: O my mind, meditate forever on the Guru, the Lord of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਗਲ ਕਲੇਸ ਮਿਟਹਿ ਇਸੁ ਤਨ ਤੇ ਮਨ ਚਿੰਦਿਆ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਈਐ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sagal kales mitteh is tan te man chindiaa fal paaeeai | rahaau |
lines.english: All illness shall depart from this body, and you shall obtain the fruits of your mind's desires. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇਆ ਮੁਖ ਊਜਲ ਭਏ ਦਰਬਾਰਾ ॥੨॥੨੭॥੯੧॥
lines.translit: saadhasang naanak naam dhiaaeaa mukh aoojal bhe darabaaraa |2|27|91|
lines.english: In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, Nanak meditates on the Naam, the Name of the Lord; his face is radiant in the Court of the Lord. ||2||27||91||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ਜਾ ਕੇ ਸਭਿ ਕੀਨੇ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਊਚਾ ਅਗਮ ਅਪਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: jeea jant jaa ke sabh keene prabh aoochaa agam apaaraa |
lines.english: God created all beings and creatures; He is lofty, inaccessible and infinite.
Sorat'h, Fifth Mehl:
I meditate in remembrance on my Lord.
I drink in the most sublime essence of the Lord's Name. ||1||
Day and night, I ever meditate on Him.
He gave me His hand, and protected me.
